{{CargoClone
|name=Onmyoji Abbe
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=116
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Wind DMG +30
|gene4=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Troop Wind DMG +0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Troop Wind DMG +1.5%
|}}
